title: Prospective Q2.4 seed-2 diagnostic
body: Run only seed 2 from the exact clean merged Zero commit. Preserve Q2.3's corpora, immutable teachers, quantity and replay gates, 25-commit recovery cadence, 100-commit public cadence, 1000 acquisition and 400 consolidation attempt caps, eight-rejection fallback, sealed promotion rule, and seed-1/3 replication lock. Resolve go only when the upstream driver emits seed_passed=1 after public and promotion gates; otherwise resolve no_go without opening replication seeds.
claims: No Q2.4 outcome is observed before this contract, forecasts, and funding commitments are recorded.
A valid no-go is a terminal experimental result, not an execution failure.
